⬆ Add one or more photos in the panel →
then use the buttons to fit the screen onto the dial.

🎯 Dial Screen Placer

Put a UI / screen design onto the dial of a product photo. Everything runs in your browser — nothing is uploaded anywhere. Each photo keeps its own placement.

1 · photos

    2 · screen design

    Pick a built-in screen, or upload a square PNG (transparent background, design centred, rim at the edges).

    3 · fit it on the dial

    position
    size
    rotate 0°
    ⟲⟳
    Jog slider spins it live, then springs back.
    tilt / perspective
    Drag handles on the photo: the big orange ✥ in the middle = drag to move the whole screen anywhere; the 4 coloured corner dots = pull each corner for perspective / size.
    Keys: W/A/S/D = move up / left / down / right · Q/E = rotate · +/− = resize. Tick finer steps for small nudges (steps scale to the photo, so one tap moves a visible amount even on huge images).

    view

    4 · trim the edge

    Bite pixels off the rim so the design doesn't clash with the real orange ring or black bezel. You'll see it update live.
    20%

    5 · save
